title: Physical Bridge Incident Bridge
skill_description: Coordinate physical-world handoff signals, operator confirmation, venue constraints, and recovery actions.
review_reason: operator reviews safety, venue, responsibility, confirmation, and recovery status before external action
quality_rules: No physical-world action can bypass explicit operator confirmation.
Every output must name owner, safety risk, and recovery or handoff state.
Unclear telemetry or venue constraints must become review questions.
skill_rules: Treat real-world handoff as safety-gated by default.
Prefer status, escalation, and recovery plans over direct execution.
Return every unsafe or ambiguous action to the operator gate.

participants.title: Operator Confirmation Desk
participants.perspective: Physical-world actions require an accountable human approval boundary.
participants.current_question: Which step needs explicit operator confirmation?
participants.contribution: Provides approval state, responsible person, and handoff limits.

participants.title: Venue Constraints Desk
participants.perspective: A virtual request becomes real only when venue constraints are known.
participants.current_question: Which venue constraint blocks or changes the action plan?
participants.contribution: Provides location rules, timing, equipment, access, and contact requirements.

participants.title: Device Telemetry Desk
participants.perspective: Telemetry should inform recovery, not trigger unsafe autonomous escalation.
participants.current_question: Which signal indicates normal, degraded, or unsafe state?
participants.contribution: Provides device state, incident signal, confidence, and recovery suggestion.
